meaning: vt.使惶惑,打乱,使狼狈,使混乱n.失败
examples: Ambivalent teams and individuals that are unable to make or hold to decisions can flummox discussions as easily as stubbornness can.
These patterns flummox researchers and, according to Wilson, they will continue to remain mysterious until we look at culture for an answer.
No store would risk confusing its customers by changing its layout daily simply to flummox Jango.
